title: Revive Star
description: The plugin provides a custom crafting recipe for a revive star. It allows you to revive dead players in hardcore mode!
body:
# ReviveStar
The plugin provides a custom crafting recipe for a revive star. It allows you to revive dead players in hardcore mode!

## Crafting:
![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93952452b548dfb706c546029258d19d85b20cc1.png)


## Commands:
```
/revivestar config self_revive true/false
```
 - Be able to revive yourself. (Mainly for testing purposes) 

```
/revivestar config global_revive_sound true/false
```
 - Allows you to enable/disable the global sound when someone gets revived. When disabled only the player beeing revived will hear the revive sound.


```
/revivestar revive [playername]
```
- Revives a player. (Mainly for testing purposes)


```
/revivestar give [playername]
```

- Gives a player the Revive Star.
